payload.label: bed
payload.short_description: beige striped bed with wood headboard
payload.long_description: Bed with a beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet and two matching rectangular pillows set against a dark polished wooden paneled headboard; linens are neatly made with faint creases and the pillows are slightly askew at the head — object occupies the foreground and appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
